commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=dcb0e9a3dd43ff37a7d5a560cd6a1232144b71a6)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds mapped `openclaw qa run --profile smoke-ci|release` dispatch through QA suite scenarios, updates QA CLI tests, and adds `qa/AGENTS.md` with a `qa/CLAUDE.md` symlink.

PR surface: Source +219, Tests +175, Docs +45. Total +439 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main treats interleaved `qa run --profile work` as a root profile, while this PR forwards that flag to a mapped-profile validator that only accepts mapped QA profile ids.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a maintainer API/compatibility choice on a protected maintainer-labeled stacked PR, not a safe autonomous repair lane.

target.title: test(qa): add mapped qa run profiles
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds `pnpm openclaw qa run --profile smoke-ci|release` as the mapped QA profile entry point on top of the scorecard evidence map.
- Resolves profile/surface/category selectors to mapped scenario refs, converts them to QA suite scenario IDs, and dispatches through the existing `qa suite` runner.
- Preserves the existing `qa run` self-check behavior when no profile is provided, and keeps `qa run --profile` command-local despite the root `--profile` flag.
- Adds `qa/AGENTS.md` plus the required `qa/CLAUDE.md` symlink so humans and agents editing QA scenarios/maturity mappings can find the profile, mapping, evidence, and validation contract without rediscovering it from code.

Stacked on #91500.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts src/cli/profile.test.ts`
- `pnpm openclaw qa run --profile smoke-ci --category agent-runtime-and-provider-execution.agent-turn-execution --provider-mode mock-openai --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/smoke-ci-profile-dispatch --allow-failures`
- `git diff --check origin/dallin/coverage-taxonomy-validation...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`
- live PR diff check for personal-name owner references
target.author: romneyda
